# 🌸 Vishal Kumar - Portfolio

A visually stunning, nature-inspired personal portfolio website featuring a Japanese cherry blossom (sakura) theme.

## ✨ Features

- **Sakura Theme**: Soft pink color palette with gradients
- **Animated Hero**: Central SVG sakura tree with blooming animation
- **Falling Petals**: Canvas-based particle system with 60+ animated petals
- **Parallax Scrolling**: Smooth parallax effects throughout
- **Glassmorphism**: Modern frosted glass UI elements
- **Interactive Cursor**: Custom cursor with glow effect
- **Smooth Animations**: Framer Motion powered scroll-triggered animations
- **Responsive Design**: Fully responsive across all devices
- **Project Modals**: Detailed project views with tech stacks
- **Timeline Achievements**: Elegant timeline layout

## 🚀 Quick Start

```bash
# 1. Install dependencies
npm install

# 2. Start development server
npm run dev

# 3. Open http://localhost:5173
```

## 📁 Project Structure

```
vishal-portfolio/
├── public/
│   └── sakura-icon.svg
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── SakuraCanvas.jsx
│   │   ├── SakuraTree.jsx
│   │   ├── Hero.jsx
│   │   ├── About.jsx
│   │   ├── Skills.jsx
│   │   ├── Projects.jsx
│   │   ├── Achievements.jsx
│   │   ├── Contact.jsx
│   │   ├── Navigation.jsx
│   │   ├── Footer.jsx
│   │   └── CursorEffect.jsx
│   ├── App.jsx
│   ├── main.jsx
│   └── index.css
├── index.html
├── package.json
├── vite.config.js
├── tailwind.config.js
└── postcss.config.js
```

## 📝 Customization

Update these files with your real information:
- `Hero.jsx` — Name & tagline
- `About.jsx` — Bio & education
- `Projects.jsx` — Your projects
- `Achievements.jsx` — Awards
- `Contact.jsx` — Email & social links
